title: Harden book and platform-spec nav client scripts

source.subject: chore(compiler): bump submodule for corelib-quality CI fix

body:
## What shipped

Hardens `@beskid/docs-ui` book and platform-spec nav client scripts (`book-nav.ts`, `platform-spec-doc-tabs.ts`, layout re-init on `astro:after-swap`) so rail state and tab selection survive ClientRouter navigation. Related landings include drawer/rail unification (`278da1b`) and SpecPageHeader polish (`d800062`).

## Source commit

Repository **`beskid`** · commit `33e5d99`

> chore(compiler): bump submodule for corelib-quality CI fix

## Completed

2026-05-24 (catalog cutoff window).
